themes.label: Love
themes.summary: This chapter foregrounds love, affection, covenant loyalty, or sacrificial care. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Cross references echo "Love".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "But his father and his mother knew not that it was of the LORD, that he sought an occasion ag...". Word-study detail reinforces "מֹֽשְׁלִ֥ים: had dominion - to rule".
